changes: scripts/racketsport/train_event_head.py:130 adds protected-input rejection; line 203 adds deterministic full training, validation, checkpoints, wall stop, resume, provenance, and throughput reporting.
scripts/racketsport/build_event_head_anchor_candidates.py:32 adds bounded on-the-fly decoding; line 98 emits the frozen Track A anchor schema.

honest_issues: The 100-step proof overfits one single-frame train window and validates on one single-frame HIT window; F1=1.0 is mechanics evidence, not generalization or accuracy proof.
The anchor proof's 3 HIT / 0 BOUNCE outputs are unreviewed predictions from that tiny overfit checkpoint.
PTS uses decode-order frame_idx/fps, matching existing protected-seed evaluation but approximating variable-frame-rate timing.
CUDA and MPS were not exercised in this CPU-only lane.
The wide tests/racketsport suite was not rerun because the owner explicitly assigned it to a concurrent read-only bystander.
BEST-STACK DELTA (c): no stack delta. No model/default was promoted and best_stack.json is untouched.
next: GPU manager can launch full pretraining, use the printed first-100 throughput for its wall cap, resume from last_event_head.pt after preemption, and feed the resulting checkpoint to the review-only anchor-candidate CLI.
